title: Class picker after polygon selection — reclassifying the enclosed points
capture_instructions: Polygon selection is complete. Yellow points are visible in the closed polygon area. The class picker panel is open alongside the 3D viewport, showing the search field and class list. Ideally show a state where a class (e.g., Sidewalks or Trees) is highlighted in the list, ready to be confirmed. This demonstrates the full end-to-end polygon reclassification workflow.
ui_state: Polygon mode, selection confirmed, class picker open with a class highlighted

annotations.label: Highlighted class entry — ready to confirm with Enter
